frames.caption: Cursor on `q`.
frames.narration: Starting in *normal mode*. We'll run {key:d}{key:w}: the delete operator followed by the word motion.

frames.caption: {key:d}{key:w} — `quick ` deleted.
frames.narration: Operator {key:d} (verb) plus motion {key:w} (noun). The same grammar applies to any operator+motion pair.

frames.caption: {key:g}{key:U}{key:w} — `BROWN` uppercased.
frames.narration: Same noun, new verb: keep the motion {key:w} (a word forward), but swap the operator for {key:g}{key:U} (uppercase). The grammar lets us compose any operator with any motion — no new syntax to learn.
